subject: progress
body: Status update: Downloaded all remaining PixelLab frames (57 total), updated driver.py, rebaked both strips, and updated index.html. Jack now has 88 frames (was 65) — added death (9f), roll (7f), rifle (7f). Stalker now has 114 frames (was 73) — added death (9f), roll (7f), leap2 (7f), shriek (9f), tongue (9f). Strips are baked and deployed. Remaining: wire up new anims in game code. All achievable without credits.
